articles.title: 'We'll see who's right' - Stokes and Santner clash over dismissal
articles.summary: There was controversy on the second morning of the third Test between England and New Zealand with the dismissal of Mitchell Santner. However, the third umpire stuck with the original decision to give Ben Stokes a vital wicket and the 250th of his Test career.
